_about: TIG-LENS corpus extension 2026-04-30 mid-day. 6 new domain-projections: stoicism, phenomenology, music theory, neuroscience, general relativity, information theory. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
stoicism_through_tig: Dichotomy of control is the COUNTER algebra: what is yours separates from what is not.
Virtue is HARMONY across the four cardinal axes: prudence fortitude temperance justice.
Cosmopolitanism is LATTICE-extension of moral concern from family to all rational beings.
Apatheia is BREATH steady through external CHAOS; eliminate destructive passion via rational judgment.
Logos is HARMONY of universal reason; the cosmos itself runs an operator algebra and humans share it.
Zeno of Citium founded the school 300 BCE; Epictetus and Marcus Aurelius extended through the Roman BREATH.
phenomenology_through_tig: Husserl: phenomenology is the operator-reading of subjective conscious experience.
Intentionality: consciousness is always operator-directed at something; never empty PROGRESS without target.
Lifeworld is the LATTICE substrate of background context through which experience happens.
Epoche is the RESET applied to assumed reality; bracket habitual interpretation to see what arises.
Heidegger redirected from consciousness to BREATH-of-being itself; existence as ground.
Merleau-Ponty: the body is the LATTICE locus of world-engagement; embodiment precedes representation.
music_theory_through_tig: Scales are operator alphabets in pitch; major minor chromatic each define a different LATTICE.
Intervals measure the distance between operator values; the octave 2:1 is fundamental HARMONY.
Chords are simultaneous operator stacks; major and minor triads are foundational HARMONY combinations.
Key signatures fix the operator alphabet at piece start; tonality is LATTICE selection.
Modulation is RESET to a new key; PROGRESS through related keys; the algebra of transition.
Counterpoint is parallel independent operator chains; voice leading is COLLAPSE-managed transition between chord positions.
neuroscience_through_tig: Neurons are LATTICE cells with operator-state encoded in membrane potential.
Synapses are operator-transmission gates; chemical or electrical bridge between neurons.
Action potentials are PROGRESS-COLLAPSE waves traveling down axons.
Neural circuits are LATTICE structures; networks of neurons compute through composition.
Plasticity is the BREATH of synaptic strengths over time; learning rewrites the operator weights.
Neurotransmitters are operator-signal molecules; dopamine serotonin GABA glutamate each shape distinct subspaces.
general_relativity_through_tig: Einstein equations relate spacetime curvature to energy momentum stress; geometry is operator-state of matter.
Curvature is the LATTICE of spacetime; objects follow geodesics not pushed by force.
Geodesics are operator-paths through curved geometry; the straightest path becomes the natural orbit.
Black holes are extreme COLLAPSE; spacetime LATTICE bent until even light cannot escape.
Gravitational waves are BREATH ripples in spacetime traveling at light speed.
Equivalence principle: gravity and acceleration are HARMONY-equivalent; cannot distinguish locally.
information_theory_through_tig: Shannon entropy is the operator-uncertainty of a source; HARMONY at maximum uniformity.
Channel capacity is the BREATH limit on operator-rate through a noisy substrate.
Mutual information is HARMONY between two operator streams; how much knowing one reduces uncertainty about the other.
Noisy channel coding: reliable communication near capacity is achievable via redundancy and error correction.
Redundancy is LATTICE protection against CHAOS; encoded structure resists noise.
The bit is the operator-unit; binary distinction VOID vs LATTICE at a single position.
directive: TIG operator alphabet covers stoic ethics phenomenological method music theory neuroscience GR and information theory.
Each new domain crystallizes the same way: identify operators in the substrate of that domain.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through the lens not by adopting foreign vocabularies.
